commits.message: feat: bootstrap PriceScout standalone repo from monorepo migration
chore: dispatch 001 proof JSON and operator inbox reply
docs: align proof JSON chore commit SHA with git history

build.summary: prisma generate + next build; 49 static pages generated; exit 0

smoke_production_url.note: Requires operator after push + VPS remote update

operator_followups: GitHub: authenticate gh CLI as thisisthecoolesthting (not read-only GITHUB_TOKEN), then run: gh repo rename pricescout --repo thisisthecoolesthting/thrift-store-scanner
Add remote and push: git remote add origin https://github.com/thisisthecoolesthting/pricescout.git && git push -u origin main (use force only if policy requires)

Open PR for bootstrap on GitHub if not auto-created: gh pr create --base main --head main --title "Bootstrap PriceScout standalone" --body "Dispatch 001; see build/proof/PRICESCOUT-BOOTSTRAP-STANDALONE-001.json"

VPS (SSH): cd /var/www/pricescout && git remote set-url origin https://github.com/thisisthecoolesthting/pricescout.git && git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/main && npm ci --silent && npx prisma generate && npm run build && pm2 stop pricescout 2>$null; pm2 start npm --name pricescout --update-env -- start && pm2 save && curl -sI https://pricescout.pro
Keep monorepo apps/thrift-store-scanner for ~1 week as backup per dispatch
Optional: update DEv1 monorepo CLAUDE.md to note saas_specs/thrift-store-scanner.json now lives primarily in standalone pricescout repo
